original_image_tags: Red rectangular bar near top of page.
Red rectangular bar near bottom of page.

elements.description: Top right: red declassification stamp text 'Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison USCENTCOM Chief of Staff Declassified on: 22 January 2026'. Top center: a red redaction bar. Bottom center: a red redaction bar. Above the bottom bar, a text box containing '3.5c, (b)(6)'. Bottom left: text 'USCENTCOM MDR 26-0019'. Bottom center: text 'Approved for Release to AARO'. Bottom right: text '01/26/26 006'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and location of two red rectangular bars, but Description B adds extensive specific text details (stamp, dates, numbers) that Description A does not mention, without direct contradiction on the core visual elements.
